Pemko 217AV36

SKU: 217AV36

Contact for Availability & Pricing

Pemko Door Shoe, Wrap Around, Eco-V® Seal, 36"

Request a Quote Back to Catalog
Authorized ASSA ABLOY / Dugmore & Duncan Distributor
Direct Vendor Pricing — No Middleman Markup
Serving Central California Since 2007

Product Details

U-Shaped Door Shoe with Rain Drip and Eco-V Insert

Features

  •    GREENGUARD Gold certified, eco-friendly material
  •    Economical bio-based material, contains no phthalates or heavy metals
  •    Assists building and design teams with emissions criteria in green building rating programs
  •    Highly versatile, easily deployable for a variety of building applications
  •    Surpasses the quality and durability of traditional vinyl, resulting in a longer service life and less need for replacement
  •    Meets the Pemko gasketing standards for compression and tensile strength, which provides exceptional energy-saving performance
  •    Prevents air leakage
  •    Heavy metal free
  •    Plasticizers from renewable carbon sources, stabilizers are organic-based and zinc free
  •    Limited ultraviolet and weather resistance, good chemical resistance to adhesives and most mild cleaning solutions

Commercial doors, frames, hardware, & access control specialist serving Central California since 2007. Complete turnkey solutions and in-house locksmithing.
